note: Cinematic Asset Pipeline (§101–§103). Status REQUIRES_EXTERNAL_GENERATION — in dieser Umgebung wird nichts als 'erstellt' behauptet. Prompts sind produktionsreif für externe Generierung; Integration über die genannten Seiten/Slots.
artDirection: PERFORMANCE LUXURY × Präzisionsdiagnostik × cinematic editorial. Dunkles Koordinatensystem, kalibrierte Cyan-Akzente (#00c2ff), reale erwachsene Männer 30–50, keine Neon-Sci-Fi-Klischees, keine Stock-Fitness-Ästhetik.

assets.prompt: Cinematic editorial photograph, athletic man in his 40s standing in a dark studio, subtle cyan coordinate grid light projection across his torso mapping body systems, precision-instrument mood, Hasselblad look, deep shadows, no text
assets.alt: Mann im dunklen Studio mit Koordinatenlicht auf dem Oberkörper

assets.prompt: Abstract dark instrument-panel environment, thin cyan reference lines and calibration ticks over near-black gradient, extremely subtle, premium automotive cockpit inspiration, no objects, no text
Elegant minimal human silhouette made of fine cyan measurement lines and nodes on near-black, medical-precision aesthetic, NOT sci-fi hologram, editorial restraint
Seven thin measurement dials arranged asymmetrically on dark field, one dial highlighted amber, laboratory-report elegance, no text
Abstract ribbon of data points forming an ascending band with uncertainty corridor, dark editorial, cyan on black, honest chart aesthetic
Cinematic photo of barbell squat mid-rep, force-vector overlay as thin cyan lines, biomechanics-textbook precision meets premium sports commercial, dark gym
Premium real food photography (steak, eggs, rice, greens) on dark slate with faint metabolic-pathway line diagram etched beside, appetizing, no meal-prep boxes
Macro photograph of blood vial on dark glass with thin data annotations, clinical luxury, pharma-grade lighting, no gore
Clinical dark still life: monitoring chart, blood pressure cuff, lab report on brushed steel, pharmaceutical restraint, absolutely no syringes glamorization
Dark room with single focused desk light over printed performance data and pen annotations, human strategist mood, no robots, no glowing brains
Editorial flat-lay of a week grid with three measurements circled in cyan pencil, decisive minimalism, dark paper
Cinematic portrait, experienced coach in conversation across a table with athlete, dark warm tones, trust and competence, documentary realism
